message:
docs: update MCP config paths and morph-mcp tool names to match current reality

Three corrections to the Claude Code MCP Config Fix section:

1. Config file location: Claude Code moved MCP server configurations
   from ~/.claude.json to ~/.claude/settings.json in recent versions.
   The docs now reference the current path as primary and mention the
   legacy path for older installs that haven't migrated.

2. morph-mcp tool names: The morph-mcp server description previously
   referenced a generic "warp_grep" tool name. Updated to the actual
   exported tool names (warpgrep_codebase_search, warpgrep_github_search)
   and clarified that it provides grep-only search, not broader code
   intelligence — so users know exactly what capabilities they're
   restoring when they run the fix script.

3. Token discovery order: The bearer token lookup chain now correctly
   lists ~/.claude/settings.json as the current location, with
   ~/.claude.json as the legacy fallback, matching the actual search
   order in the fix script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -542,7 +542,7 @@ rm ~/.bun/bin/claude 2>/dev/null ### Claude Code MCP Config Fix -Claude Code stores MCP server configurations in `~/.claude.json`. These can get wiped out by fresh installs, updates, or config corruption. Instead of running the full MCP Agent Mail installer, use this lightweight script that only restores the MCP config. +Claude Code stores MCP server configurations in `~/.claude/settings.json` on current installs, though older installs may still use `~/.claude.json`. These can get wiped out by fresh installs, updates, or config corruption. Instead of running the full MCP Agent Mail installer, use this lightweight script that only restores the MCP config. **One command fix:** @@ -555,7 +555,7 @@ fix_cc_mcp | Server | Type | Purpose | |:-------|:-----|:--------| | `mcp-agent-mail` | HTTP | Multi-agent coordination, messaging, file reservations | -| `morph-mcp` | stdio | AI-powered code search via `warp_grep` | +| `morph-mcp` | stdio | AI-powered grep-only Morph search via `warpgrep_codebase_search,warpgrep_github_search` |
Quick install @@ -574,7 +574,7 @@ Or copy the script from the full guide.
-**Token discovery:** The script automatically finds your bearer token from `MCP_AGENT_MAIL_TOKEN` env var, `~/mcp_agent_mail/.env`, or existing `~/.claude.json`. +**Token discovery:** The script automatically finds your bearer token from `MCP_AGENT_MAIL_TOKEN`, `~/mcp_agent_mail/.env`, current `~/.claude/settings.json`, or legacy `~/.claude.json`. **[Full guide →](FIX_CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_CONFIG.md)**
